creator: sheldonh@uunet.co.za
text:
I wish FreeBSD would just get off its arse and do everything I
	want it to do.  I want it to support all my hardware.  I want
	everything to be documented to my satisfaction.  I want to be
	notified of every change that affects me directly, but I don't
	want to read anything that's not pertinent to my configuration.

Fix: 

Stop having lives and giveme what I want!
How-To-Repeat: 
	Just look at FreeBSD.  Notice how it doesn't do what I w2ant.
